title: Nursery Rhyme. XXXIV. Literal
content:
Great A, little a,
            Bouncing B!
        The cat's in the cupboard,
            And she can't see.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. XXXIV. Literal"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
